coaching_cards.title: Greeting the Customer
coaching_cards.content: Good morning! Thank you for calling. How can I assist you today?

coaching_cards.title: Identifying Customer Needs
coaching_cards.content: Can you please tell me what specific issue or question you have today?

coaching_cards.title: Be Mindful of Tone
coaching_cards.content: Ensure your tone is warm and welcoming to create a positive first impression.

coaching_cards.title: Accessing Knowledge Base
coaching_cards.content: If the customer mentions a specific product or service, quickly refer to the knowledge base for relevant information.
